mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_budget t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.budget_year DESC, t.department, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_budget WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_budget t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.budget_year = #{year} ORDER BY t.department, t.id DESC
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_budget t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.department = #{department} ORDER BY t.budget_year DESC, t.id DESC
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_budget t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_budget ( budget_year, department, budget_amount, spent_amount, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{budgetYear}, #{department}, #{budgetAmount}, #{spentAmount}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_budget SET budget_year = #{budgetYear}, department = #{department}, budget_amount = #{budgetAmount}, spent_amount = #{spentAmount}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_budget SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
